section.heading: Establishment of committees to assist in research and service programs

content.p: In the furtherance of the research and service work authorized by this Act, the Secretary of Agriculture may, in addition to the national advisory committee, establish appropriate committees, including representatives of producers, industry, government and science, to assist in effectuating specific research and service programs.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: This Act, referred to in text, is act Aug. 14, 1946, ch. 966, 60 Stat. 1082, which enacted this chapter and sections 427h, 427j, and 3105 of this title and amended section 3104 of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.
The national advisory committee, referred to in text, was established by section 1628 of this title, which was subsequently repealed by Pub. L. 93–86, § 2, Aug. 10, 1973, 87 Stat. 246.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was not enacted as part of the Agricultural Marketing Act of 1946 which comprises this chapter.
